# service/coffee/module/get-coffees/get-coffees.service.spec

> **Unit Test Layer**

Unit tests for the [GetCoffeesService](../get-coffees.service/classes/GetCoffeesService.md).

## Remarks

Runs the service inside an isolated Effect DI container backed by
[InMemoryCoffeeRepository](../../../repository/coffee-repository/variables/InMemoryCoffeeRepository.md).  Validates that `execute` returns
all four seed coffees with the expected `name` and `price` properties.
